title: mentha aquatica var. brachystachya
intro: Mentha aquatica var. brachystachya, commonly known as dwarf water mint, is a compact, perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. brachystachya include its ability to ease nausea, improve digestion, and provide relief from headaches and migraines. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
